message:
test(conformance): differential harness for arpa/inet.h vs glibc

CONFORMANCE: libc arpa/inet.h diff matrix.

7 functions covered:
- htons / ntohs round-trip (7 u16 values incl. byte-swap boundaries)
- htonl / ntohl round-trip (7 u32 values incl. CAFEBABE)
- inet_pton(AF_INET): 13 cases incl. valid v4, octet-overflow,
  missing/extra octets, non-numeric, leading-zero edge case, leading
  whitespace, empty
- inet_pton(AF_INET6): 10 cases incl. ::, ::1, fe80::1, full form,
  IPv4-mapped, invalid, triple-colon
- inet_ntop(AF_INET): 6 v4 addresses, exact string match
- inet_ntop(AF_INET6): 4 v6 addresses, exact string match
- inet_aton: 6 cases incl. valid + invalid

inet_pton/ntop/aton declared via local extern blocks since the libc
crate does not re-export them.

0 divergences observed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
